title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 621.135 - Administrative procedure
text:
621.135.  Administrative procedure. — The provisions of chapter 536, and any amendments thereto, except those provisions or amendments which are in conflict with sections 621.015 to 621.198, and any civil rule hereafter adopted which supersedes an applicable provision of chapter 536, shall apply to and govern the proceedings of the administrative hearing commission and the rights and duties of the parties involved.
(L. 1965 p. 277 § 8)
